General.Name: AV Concept Holdings Ltd
General.Description: AV Concept Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the marketing and distribution of electronic components in Hong Kong and Singapore. It operates through four segments: Semiconductor Distribution, Consumer Product and Product Sourcing Business, Venture Capital, and Others. The company also engages in the design, development, and sale of consumer products, as well as product sourcing services. In addition, it invests in listed/unlisted equity and debt investments, managed funds, convertible bonds, and listed bonds; provides online advertising and event organization services; and operates parenting platform under the He She Kids brand name. Further, the company engages in the internet social media business; and provision of web design, development, and content creation services. AV Concept Holdings Limited was founded in 1980 and is headquartered in Kowloon Bay, Hong Kong.
General.Address: Enterprise Square Three, Kowloon Bay, Hong Kong
